settings.heading: Gold, Silver & Bronze Medals in Bulk
settings.subheading: Classic 1st/2nd/3rd-place gold, silver and bronze medals in bulk for any competition — with custom centres, ribbons and event branding, from ₹25 a piece. Pan-India delivery.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices in India. Final price depends on size, material and engraving. Bulk discounts apply. GST invoice available.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Meru Trophy supplies gold, silver and bronze medals in bulk from ₹25 a piece — classic 1st/2nd/3rd-place sets with custom centres and ribbons for any competition. Delivered pan-India. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: The classic podium set
settings.text: Gold, silver and bronze is the universal language of placement. We supply the full podium set in metal and alloy finishes, with plain or custom centres carrying your event name, sport or logo, on custom-colour ribbons. Order balanced 1-2-3 sets for any number of events — sports days, tournaments, academic and cultural competitions.

settings.title: Custom centres & ribbons
settings.text: Event name, sport or logo and matching ribbons.

settings.question: Can I order an even split of gold/silver/bronze?
settings.answer: Yes — tell us the number of events and we'll supply a balanced 1-2-3 set with spares.

settings.question: Can the medals carry our event branding?
settings.answer: Yes — custom centres with your event name, sport or logo, plus colour-matched ribbons.

settings.question: How low does the price go in bulk?
settings.answer: From ₹25 each for standard medals, dropping further with quantity.

settings.heading: Need gold, silver & bronze medals for an event?
settings.text: Tell us the occasion, quantity and date — we'll send designs and a quote, usually within the hour.
